headline: Mondelez Gears Up for Q1 Earnings: Essential Insights for Investors
summary: Mondelez heads into its April 28 Q1 report with revenues seen rising to $9.77 billion and EPS forecast at 61 cents, down year over year.

headline: Kimberly-Clark's Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Key Factors to Note
summary: KMB's first-quarter results are likely to reflect declines in sales and earnings amid pricing pressure, competitive intensity and uneven consumer demand.
